- [ ] 🔊 Audio / asset addition
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / code quality

- [ ] 🔒 Security / privacy fix

## Privacy Checklist
<!-- Every PR must confirm these -->

- [ ] No Firebase / analytics / ad SDKs added

- [ ] All new data stored locally in Hive only
